summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 4 features: Staff Management with points system, shift tracking, inventory management with stock transactions. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Staff Management page with period filters, points/shift dialogs, leaderboard; Inventory page with ingredient CRUD, purchase/usage transactions, transaction history, low stock alerts.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning) - minor

critical_code_review_comments: Staff Management page correctly shows leaderboard sorted by points
Period filters (today/week/month/year) working correctly for staff performance
Points history tracking with positive/negative points and reasons
Shift logs with all 4 types: work, rest, absent, late
Inventory page shows stock summary with purchased/used/cost
Low stock alert (is_low_stock) correctly calculated when current_stock <= min_stock
PIN verification uses user's personal admin_pin (admin1 PIN: 1234)
All UI text is in Azerbaijani language as required
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed ingredients and users during testing. Existing data: 2 ingredients (Yumurta with 135 stock, Un with 50 stock), 1 waiter with 12 points.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 4 features tested and working. Staff Management at /admin/staff with PIN protection, Inventory at /admin/inventory with PIN protection. Admin PIN is 1234 (user's personal PIN). Existing test data: 2 ingredients, 1 waiter with points and shift logs.

features_tested.staff_management_page: PASS - Loads at /admin/staff with PIN protection
features_tested.staff_performance_table: PASS - Shows points, orders, delivery time, shifts, rest days
features_tested.period_filters: PASS - Today/Week/Month/Year filters change performance data
features_tested.add_points_dialog: PASS - Opens and allows adding/deducting points with reason
features_tested.add_shift_dialog: PASS - Opens and allows creating shift logs (work/rest/absent/late)
features_tested.points_history_dialog: PASS - Shows points history with timestamps and reasons
features_tested.shift_logs_display: PASS - Shows recent shift logs with badges
features_tested.inventory_page: PASS - Loads at /admin/inventory with PIN protection
features_tested.ingredient_crud: PASS - Create, read, update, delete ingredients
features_tested.stock_transactions: PASS - Purchase increases stock, usage decreases stock
features_tested.transaction_history: PASS - Shows transaction history per ingredient
features_tested.low_stock_alert: PASS - is_low_stock flag when current_stock <= min_stock
features_tested.inventory_summary: PASS - Shows total purchased, used, cost per ingredient
features_tested.pin_verification: PASS - Uses user's personal admin_pin (1234 for admin1)
features_tested.sidebar_navigation: PASS - Personal and İnventar nav items visible

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/shifts - PASS (work, rest, absent, late types)
